ac_coverage.notes: Two tests cover AC-001: 'greet returns Hello name' (Alice) and 'greet returns Hello with any name' (Bob). Both assert the exact expected string format 'Hello, {name}!'. Specific assertions via toBe().

One test covers AC-002: 'greet with empty string returns Hello World'. Asserts exact return value 'Hello, World!' via toBe(). Happy path and the edge-case (empty string) are both the same scenario here — fully covered.
AC-003 is meta: at least one test per AC must exist in tests/Unit/GreetingTest.php using Pest, all passing with exit 0. Verified: 3 tests, 3 assertions, all passed, duration 0.18s, exit 0.

summary: All 3 ACs have adequate test coverage, assertions are specific, no fragile patterns detected, all 3 tests pass with exit 0.
